name: OpenClaw Monitor
description: Real-time monitoring console: aggregates diagnostic events, exposes overview / events / runs / logs REST endpoints, streams live events over SSE, and serves a self-contained dashboard at /monitor.

maxPerType.description: Maximum events retained in memory per event type (hot path).

kind.description: Persistence mode. `memory` disables on-disk storage entirely.

path.description: Override the storage directory. Defaults to ${stateDir}/openclaw-monitor.

audit.description: Conversation content audit. Captures the four touchpoints (project → OpenClaw, OpenClaw → LLM, LLM → OpenClaw, OpenClaw → project) via plugin hooks. Disabled by default — opt in when you accept the privacy and storage tradeoffs.

enabled.description: When true, captures full prompt and response text. Storage grows with conversation volume.

contentMaxBytes.description: Truncate any single content string longer than this. Truncated segments are flagged with truncated=true.

retainDays.description: Daily JSONL files older than this are deleted. Keep this short — content files grow much faster than event files.

captureSystemPrompt.description: When false, the system prompt is omitted from llm_input segments. Many deployments treat the system prompt as a commercial secret.
